name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkTaken(i, p) == forks[i] = p

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
    \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i)) /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: No two philosophers hold the same fork *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = {}
  /\ state' = "Candidate"

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in FiniteSet

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \notin readers'
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \notin readers'
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ Values \subseteq Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE
VARIABLES chunk, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, file

Init ==
    /\ file = FILE
    /\ chunk = 1
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ chunk <= Len(file)
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ chunk' = chunk + 1
       \/ /\ chunk' = chunk
          /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
          /\ chunk' <= Len(file)
    /\ receivedChunks' = IF chunk' <= Len(file) THEN Append(receivedChunks, chunk') ELSE receivedChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E k \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![k] = offsets[k] + (clocks[i] + clocks[j] - 2*clocks[k]) \div 3]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = TRUE, ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE, ![1] = TRUE, ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = infected \cup known

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
           /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ /\ free' = free
           /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
           /\ p \in allocated[c]
           /\ p \in free

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
        /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
        /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
        /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq free
        /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants[0] = 0
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[0] = 0
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants[0] = 1

        \/ /\ turn = 0

        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[0] = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 1
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
